name: Ensnaring Strike
description: The next time you hit a creature with a weapon attack before this spell ends, a writhing mass of thorny vines appears at the point of impact, and the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained by the magical vines until the spell ends. A Large or larger creature has advantage on this saving throw. While restrained, the target takes 1d6 piercing damage at the start of each of its turns.
effect: Empowers next weapon hit: on hit target saves STR or is restrained by vines (1d6 piercing/turn while restrained).
notes: On-hit rider: secondary STR save vs. restrained (DoT while restrained) requires on-hit-rider + restrained condition engine support — see proposals.
Shape: buff (no save on cast, no spell attack). Mana 3: hard control (restrained) + DoT — strongest ranger L1 crowd control.
Spider-silk×1 (binding domain, 25gp, no focus provides it — always consumed). Tree-sap stripped: yew-wand provides it free, so it was not a real cost for rangers.

material_component.focus_provided: No focus provides spider-silk — always consumed.
